title: The Breath of All Things
description: On pages 5–8, this part focuses on the breath of all things, keeping the scene centered on the conflict, choices, and stakes of the Alabasta arc.
scene: The Breath of All Things. Zoro pushes past his limits against Mr. 1 and discovers the state of mind needed to cut steel. This section presents the immediate scene beat before the dialogue continues.

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: Haha... It's just as the king himself so pathetically stated.

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: But Ms. Wednesday... It wasn't just your life that you risked. You should thank those pirate-friends of yours for helping you come this far.

dialogue.speaker: Mr. 1
dialogue.text: Where's Luffy!?

dialogue.speaker: Mr. 1
dialogue.text: And what're you doing here!?

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Oh, did I not mention he's dead already?

dialogue.speaker: Mr. 1
dialogue.text: You're lying!

dialogue.speaker: Mr. 1
dialogue.text: There's no way he could ever be killed by the likes of you!

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: Hmph... Think whatever you wish...

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: In any case, let me make it clear that I have no intention of sparing you and your father.

dialogue.speaker: Alabasta rebel
dialogue.text: It's only natural that when a kingdom falls, the royal family should perish with it.

dialogue.speaker: King Cobra
dialogue.text: But before I replace you on the throne, Cobra,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: There is one question I must ask...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: A question to which my ultimate objective is tied with...

dialogue.speaker: Miss All Sunday
dialogue.text: Where is Pluton?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: How do you know that name!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Aghhh!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Drip

dialogue.speaker: Mr. 1
dialogue.text: Looks like you've got quite the interesting weapon there,

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: But without any practical offensive capabilities,

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: Isn't it more accurate to call it a toy...?

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: Only objects,

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: Made with the express purpose of terminating life...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: can be called-

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Ahhh!

dialogue.speaker: Mr. 1
dialogue.text: POP...

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: A weapon...

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: I'll be killed if I don't act quickly!

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: Ahhh!

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: Grin

summary: This part develops the breath of all things and pushes the Alabasta conflict closer to its next decisive turn.
